title: Finnish Experiences of Volunteering with Asylum Seekers 2018-2019
description: The dataset consists of 32 texts on Finnish experiences of voluntary work with asylum seekers. Data collection was organised by the Finnish Literature Society. In the writing guidelines, the participants were asked to write about their reasons for doing voluntary work with asylum seekers, their experiences regarding the work, and the relationship they had with the asylum seekers. The respondents were asked to describe their experiences of both short-term and long-term voluntary work. The respond
